title: The Motto
why_this_song: The Motto by Tiësto (2021) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Throw it back with no chaser, with no trouble (mhm)
Poppin' that Moët, baby, let's make some bubbles (mhm)
Puffin' on that gelato, wanna be seein' double
Tell me, did I just stutter?
Drop a few bills, then pop a few champagne bottles (mhm)
Throwin' that money like you just won the lotto (mhm)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "that's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "that's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "motto" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "motto" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: We've been up all damn summer (oh)

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Tiësto one question about "The Motto", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Tiësto sobre "The Motto", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The Motto" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The Motto" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "The Motto" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "The Motto" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Motto" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Motto" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Motto" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Motto", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
